initiatives.name: SURJ Boston
initiatives.description: Local chapter of Showing Up For Racial Justice, a national network of groups and individuals organizing white people for racial justice.

initiatives.name: OUT Metrowest
initiatives.description: OUT MetroWest builds communities where LGBTQ+ youth thrive. Our free programs connect LGBTQ+ youth with supportive peers and LGBTQ+ adult role models.

initiatives.name: Greater Boston Tenants Union
initiatives.description: We don't need landlords, they need us! Building tenant power in the Greater Boston area.

initiatives.name: Warm Up Boston
initiatives.description: A radical survival program serving, supporting, and empowering Boston's unhoused community through solidarity rather than charity.

initiatives.name: Boston Revolutionary Socialists
initiatives.description: A revolutionary socialist organization fostering mutual aid and community solidarity through collective organizing in Boston. They coordinate political education, direct action support, and solidarity networks while building power through community organizing and creating spaces for collective study and struggle.

initiatives.name: BDS Boston
initiatives.description: An organization building the BDS movement in the Greater Boston area in solidarity with Palestine.

initiatives.name: Kataluma
initiatives.description: A Boston refugee hospitality fellowship working to create safe and welcoming transitional lodgings for newly arrived refugees and asylum-seekers.

initiatives.name: Boston Food Not Bombs
initiatives.description: A grassroots collective fostering mutual aid through free food distribution and community solidarity in Boston. They coordinate weekly food shares, resource recovery, and solidarity networks while building power through direct action against food waste and hunger, creating spaces for community gathering and collective care.

initiatives.name: Asian American Resource Workshop
initiatives.description: We are a political home for pan-Asian communities in Greater Boston. We are a member-led organization committed to building grassroots power through political education, creative expression, and issue-based and neighborhood organizing.

initiatives.name: Allston-Brighton Community Fridges
initiatives.description: A mutual aid network maintaining community fridges and pantries in the Allston-Brighton neighborhoods of Boston. They coordinate food distribution, resource sharing, and community care while building power through neighborhood solidarity and creating accessible spaces for food security.

initiatives.name: Weelaunee Solidarity Boston
initiatives.description: A solidarity collective organizing mutual aid and direct support for Indigenous land defense in Weelaunee (Atlanta Forest). They coordinate resource sharing, political education, and solidarity networks while building connections between Boston communities and Indigenous-led struggles for land sovereignty.

initiatives.name: Boston Anarchist Book Fair
initiatives.description: An annual gathering fostering mutual aid and radical education through literature, workshops, and community building. They coordinate book distribution, skill sharing, and solidarity networks while creating spaces for anarchist organizing, political education, and building connections between various mutual aid initiatives.
